allow: Bash(python -c "from database import init_db; init_db\(\); print\('DB OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from models import SignupRequest; from auth import create_token; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data.db'\); conn.execute\('DELETE FROM signups'\); conn.commit\(\); conn.close\(\); print\('Test data cleaned'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in sorted\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\)]")
Bash(python -c "from routers.admin import router; print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in router.routes]\)")
Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); import uvicorn; uvicorn.run\('backend.main:app', host='0.0.0.0', port=8000\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} activities loaded'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{d['date']} {d['shift']} \({d['signup_count']}/{d['max_signup']}\)\\"\) for d in data]")
